closure_text: Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 1; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-283 updated accordingly.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Containment isolated 37 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Containment isolated 8 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Material lot quarantined pending CoA review; disposition set to use-as-is after engineering waiver.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Containment isolated 17 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
